arguments.js_code: console.log('=== Canvas Feature Test ==='); try { const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); console.log('Canvas element creation:', !!canvas); console.log('Canvas type:', typeof canvas); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); console.log('Canvas 2D context:', !!ctx); console.log('Context type:', typeof ctx); if (ctx) { console.log('fillRect method:', typeof ctx.fillRect); console.log('strokeRect method:', typeof ctx.strokeRect); console.log('fillText method:', typeof ctx.fillText); } } catch (e) { console.log('Error:', e.message); }
